name: How to use Claude
description: An example project that also doubles as a how-to guide for using Claude. Chat with it to learn more about how to get the most out of chatting with Claude!

name: Cultural Benchmarking Project Analysis Part
description: This project works on trying to identify how accurately do LLM represent cultures(in terms of countries) and when they make errors in cultural representations, are there any patterns.
